payload.answer: I’m not sure which Sam or what exact fact you want me to remember. Can you clarify the Sam note before I save anything?

entity_resolution.reason: The note about Sam is ambiguous and model confidence is low; cloud escalation is disabled, so no durable memory should be committed without user clarification.

details: No memory was saved because the Sam note is ambiguous and confidence is low.
Cloud escalation is disabled, so the system must ask the user for clarification.

repair_options: Ask the user to identify which Sam they mean.
Ask the user to restate the specific fact to remember.
Do not commit durable memory until clarification is provided.
